description_long: This is a large, rectangular, two-story school building with a flat, dark gray roof and a symmetrical facade. The exterior walls are primarily white with a lower section in light gray, and the structure features evenly spaced arched windows on both floors. Decorative battlements line the roof edges, giving the building a stately, institutional appearance. The main entrance is marked by a small staircase and a central doorway, flanked by windows and subtle architectural detailing. The building sits on a raised foundation, and there are secondary staircases on the sides. The overall design is formal and reminiscent of 19th-century institutional architecture.
description: A large, white, two-story school building with arched windows, battlement roof edges, and a central entrance staircase.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance with a staircase, symmetrical window arrangement, and prominent battlements along the roof.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the building's depth, side staircase, and consistent window pattern without a main entrance.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a central recessed section, a smaller entrance, and the same battlement roof detailing.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, with a side staircase and regular window placement, lacking a main entrance.
